ogTitle: Panorama vs Para Hills West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Panorama and Para Hills West.
heading: Panorama vs Para Hills West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Panorama, South Australia and Para Hills West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Para Hills West has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Panorama (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Panorama or Para Hills West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Panorama has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Para Hills West scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Panorama scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Para Hills West scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Panorama or Para Hills West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Para Hills West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
